channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Manitoba Prepares for Potential Severe Wildfire Season
item.description: Residents and authorities in Manitoba are taking proactive measures in anticipation of another severe wildfire season. Following recent dry conditions and warmer-than-average temperatures, experts war...

item.title: Police and Family Seek Assistance to Find Missing Canberra Woman Brianna Savage
item.description: Authorities and family members are expressing concern for the welfare of 20-year-old Brianna Savage, who has been reported missing in Canberra since the morning of Sunday, April 5, 2026. According to ...

item.title: Dar es Salaam man sentenced to death for murder with screwdriver
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, the High Court at the Dar es Salaam Sub-Registry has sentenced Omary Ng’azi to death by hanging after convicting him of murdering his neighbour, Frazer Chiwiya, using a screwdriver. ...

item.title: Supporting University Students with Autism: Challenges and Strategies
item.description: As more students with autism enter higher education, universities in South Africa and globally are recognising the need to adapt learning environments to support their unique challenges. Autism can in...

item.title: US Conducts Risky Rescue Operations for Downed Airmen in Iran Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: On Sunday, former US President Donald Trump announced that American forces successfully recovered a second airman who had ejected over Iran. Trump described the operation as one of the most daring sea...

item.title: DILG Confirms Revilla Receives Standard Detention at Quezon City Jail
item.description: The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) has confirmed that former senator Ramon 'Bong' Revilla Jr. is not receiving any special treatment while detained at the Quezon City Jail. Fol...

item.title: Police arrest additional suspects following the fatal shooting of 14-year-old in Woolwich
item.description: Police in southeast London have arrested two more individuals in connection with the tragic killing of 14-year-old Eghosa Ogbebor in Woolwich. The incident occurred on Thursday afternoon in Lord Warwi...

item.title: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma rejects allegations about his wife holding multiple foreign passports
item.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has firmly rejected claims made by Congress leader Pawan Khera alleging that his wife, Riniki Bhuyan Sarma, holds passports from three foreign countries: the U...

item.title: Experiencing a Manchester Meetup Organised by an AI Bot
item.description: In March 2026, a new AI assistant named 'Gaskell', inspired by the Manchester-based writer Elizabeth Gaskell, invited a journalist to a tech meetup in Manchester. The AI autonomously managed communica...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens Mining and Controls Spending to Shield Economy from Global Shocks
item.description: Tanzania, in response to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East affecting global oil supply, has taken proactive steps to protect its economy. The war involving the United States and Israel against I...

item.title: Families of Detained Military Officers Protest Over Delayed Trials and Seek Justice
item.description: Yesterday for Abuja, children and wives of military officers wey dey detained for alleged coup staged peaceful protest for National Assembly. Dem dey demand say government make trial of their husbands...

item.title: Challenges Facing Tanzanian Football Referees and How to Improve Them
item.description: For many weekends in Tanzania, football matches are full of excitement, but soon enough, fans focus more on the referee than the players. Referees, wearing black, neon green, or other colours, are oft...

item.title: Johnny Depp Launches Three Hearts Rum with Unique Pirate-Inspired Design
item.description: Johnny Depp has introduced Three Hearts Rum, a limited-edition spirit that blends artistry and personal symbolism. The bottle design draws inspiration from Depp’s tattoos and other personal icons, inc...

item.title: NTA Releases Revised UGC NET December 2025 Answer Key for History and Commerce Following Court Order
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the revised final answer key for the University Grants Commission-National Eligibility Test (UGC-NET) December 2025 session, following directions from th...

item.title: Experts Urge Tree Planting to Combat Drought and Protect Environment in Kenya
item.description: Experts in Kenya have raised serious concerns over rising deforestation and its potential to trigger prolonged droughts and disrupt rainfall patterns. Professor Peter Kirira, Deputy Vice-Chancellor of...

item.title: Environment Canada Issues Rainfall Warning for Toronto This Weekend
item.description: Environment Canada has issued a rainfall warning for Toronto, with up to 40 millimetres of rain expected over the upcoming weekend. Residents should prepare for wet conditions, as the forecast indicat...

item.title: Plateau Governor Says Attackers Pretended To Be NDLEA Officers In Jos
item.description: The Plateau State Governor, Caleb Mutfwang, don reveal say the recent attack for Angwan Rukuba, Jos North Local Government Area, wey kill at least 28 people and injure many others, na some gunmen wey ...

item.title: Readers criticise political clichés and call for substance in public debate

item.title: Gilas Men eliminated from FIBA 3x3 Asia Cup after South Korea defeat
item.description: The Gilas Pilipinas Men's 3x3 basketball team was eliminated from the FIBA 3x3 Asia Cup after suffering a loss against South Korea in the quarterfinals. Despite showing promising moments during the to...

item.title: Kenyan Churches Revive Easter Story Through Local Theatre
item.description: Every Easter season, many churches across Kenya turn their sanctuaries into small theatres, giving faithfuls a chance to witness Jesus’s story brought to life on stage. These Easter plays, done by you...
